positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for premise_claim
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u33,axiom,
    ~man(windy)).

cnf(u45,axiom,
    michael = peter).

cnf(u49,axiom,
    taller_than(michael,michael)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    taller_than(michael,X0) | michael = X0).

cnf(u53,axiom,
    can_block(michael,X0) | ~man(X0) | michael = X0).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    taller_than(peter,michael)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    can_block(michael,X0) | jumps_when_shooting(X0) | ~man(X0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~taller_than(X1,X2) | ~taller_than(X0,X1) | taller_than(X0,X2)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    man(peter)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    ~jumps_when_shooting(X0) | great_shooter(X0)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~can_block(michael,windy)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~taller_than(X0,X1) | ~man(X0) | ~man(X1) | can_block(X0,X1)).

cnf(u56,axiom,
    can_block(michael,michael)).

cnf(u39,axiom,
    ~taller_than(X0,peter) | taller_than(X0,michael)).

cnf(u28,negated_conjecture,
    ~great_shooter(windy)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    man(michael)).

cnf(u40,axiom,
    ~taller_than(X0,michael) | taller_than(X0,X1) | michael = X1).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
